summary: Frontend-only testing completed for Davwo Energy platform. All 11 features tested and passing. About page renders all 6 sections correctly, founder photos load successfully, Platform Architecture has numbered layer cards (01-04), Programme page has 2x2 card grid with scrolling carousels, navigation works between all 5 pages, and Tesla-like bright white minimalist aesthetic is maintained.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. About page has 6 sections (Hero, Our Mission, Our Approach with 4 cards, The Davwo Story, Founding Team with 2 members, Looking Ahead with dark bg). Platform Architecture has 4 numbered layer cards. Programme has 2x2 card grid and 3 scrolling pill carousels. Navigation works between all 5 pages. Scroll animations trigger correctly and elements stay visible once revealed.

about_page.hero_section: PASS - About label and heading found
about_page.our_mission_section: PASS - Section found with correct heading
about_page.our_approach_section: PASS - 4 interactive cards with hover effects
about_page.davwo_story_section: PASS - Section found with correct heading
about_page.founding_team_section: PASS - 2 founder cards with photos loading correctly
about_page.no_horizontal_dividers: PASS - No hr elements or section borders found
about_page.scroll_animations: PASS - Elements become visible after scrolling

platform_architecture_page.numbered_layer_cards: PASS - All 4 cards (01-04) present with correct titles

programme_page.scrolling_carousels: PASS - 3 carousel tracks with 60 pill items

design_verification.text_contrast: PASS - Dark gray text on white background
